operator_scope.semantic_signature: candidate semantic bridge for expanded KBX softmax/log-softmax/cross-entropy/attention primitives

valid_when: The concrete KBX op is softmax, fused_softmax_log, fused_log_softmax_linear, fused_repeat_interleave_log_softmax, fused_cross_entropy_log_softmax, attention, or an equivalent softmax-centered primitive.
invalid_when: The task is pure matmul, pure layernorm, or a non-softmax pointwise expression.
preconditions: Read dim, dtype, reduction, target, ignore_index, label_smoothing, causal mask, softmax_scale, and output contract from OpSpec.

mechanism: Old row-softmax capsules cover max-subtract stability and masked denominator lanes, but expanded KBX tasks add log-space outputs, cross-entropy target/reduction semantics, repeat_interleave shape changes, linear/matmul subexpressions, and attention score/value aggregation.

instructions: For softmax/log_softmax subexpressions, preserve max-subtraction numerical stability and declared output dtype.
For fused_softmax_log and fused log-softmax variants, do not confuse log(softmax(x)) with softmax(x) or return the wrong domain.
For cross entropy, handle target indices, ignore_index, optional class weights, reduction mode, and label_smoothing exactly as declared before optimizing.
For attention, treat qk score matmul, optional causal mask, softmax scale, and value aggregation as part of the contract; do not apply a row-softmax-only skeleton to the whole task.
Keep high-level PyTorch cross_entropy/log_softmax/attention fallbacks out of the submitted target path unless a task-specific legality rule allows them.
action.patch_hint: Reuse existing softmax stable capsules for the softmax subexpression, then explicitly model any fused pre/post operation and output shape before tuning.

expected_effect.correctness: Supplements old row-softmax KB for fused log-softmax, CE, repeat-interleave, linear, and attention variants.
expected_effect.performance: No H20 performance claim; candidate remains quarantine until validated by runs.
expected_effect.search_efficiency: Prevents treating all expanded softmax tasks as plain row softmax.
expected_effect.risk: Attention and cross entropy combine multiple primitives and may require task/harness-specific legality support.

validation.promotion_policy: Remain quarantine until individual expanded softmax tasks have legal hidden-correct H20 traces.

known_failures: Returning softmax where log_softmax is required.
Applying softmax before causal mask in attention.
boundary_tests: optional bias/weight where task includes them
